query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE 'R. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as r_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE 'Av. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as av_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Dr.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as dr_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Cel.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cel_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Prof.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as prof_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Gen.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as gen_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Alm.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as alm_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Brig.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as brig_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Min.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as min_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Cap.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cap_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Mal.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mal_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Sen.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sen_dot
FROM establishments;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE 'R. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as r_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE 'Av. %' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as av_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Dr.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as dr_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Cel.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cel_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Prof.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as prof_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Gen.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as gen_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Alm.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as alm_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Brig.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as brig_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Min.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as min_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Cap.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cap_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Mal.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mal_dot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Sen.%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sen_dot
FROM establishments;
